mapper.select: SELECT s.spending_no, s.member_no, s.category_no, c.category_name, s.amount, s.merchant, s.spending_date FROM spending s INNER JOIN spending_category c ON s.category_no = c.category_no WHERE s.member_no = #{memberNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(s.spending_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY s.spending_date

SELECT e.expected_no, e.member_no, e.category_no, c.category_name, e.expected_amount, e.merchant, e.expected_date FROM expected_spending e INNER JOIN spending_category c ON e.category_no = c.category_no WHERE e.member_no = #{memberNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(e.expected_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY e.expected_date
